snapshot.title: Source File Walker
snapshot.summary: Recursively walks the scan directory and collects source files matching configured extensions.
snapshot.description:
Recursively walks the scan directory and collects source files matching configured extensions.
Skips ignored system/build directories and the generated output file itself.
snapshot.jsdocRaw:
/**
 * @auto-doc
 * @title Source File Walker
 * @group File Discovery
 * Recursively walks the scan directory and collects source files matching configured extensions.
 * Skips ignored system/build directories and the generated output file itself.
 * @param dir Current directory being traversed.
 * @param extensions Allowed file extensions.
 * @param outputFilePath Absolute path of the generated docs output file.
 * @returns A flat list of absolute source file paths.
 */

params.name: param
params.value: dir Current directory being traversed.

params.name: param
params.value: extensions Allowed file extensions.

params.name: param
params.value: outputFilePath Absolute path of the generated docs output file.

snapshot.returns: A flat list of absolute source file paths.

snapshot.title: Path Normalizer
snapshot.summary: Normalizes file separators for stable cross-platform path keys.
snapshot.description: Normalizes file separators for stable cross-platform path keys.
snapshot.jsdocRaw:
/**
 * @auto-doc
 * @title Path Normalizer
 * @group Plugin Internals
 * Normalizes file separators for stable cross-platform path keys.
 * @param value Input path value that may include platform-specific separators.
 * @returns A slash-normalized path string.
 */
snapshot.signature: export const normalize = (value: string): string => value.replaceAll('\\', '/');

params.name: param
params.value: value Input path value that may include platform-specific separators.

snapshot.returns: A slash-normalized path string.

snapshot.title: JSDoc Line Cleaner
snapshot.summary: Removes leading JSDoc formatting tokens from a single comment line.
snapshot.description: Removes leading JSDoc formatting tokens from a single comment line.
snapshot.jsdocRaw:
/**
 * @auto-doc
 * @title JSDoc Line Cleaner
 * @group Parser Helpers
 * Removes leading JSDoc formatting tokens from a single comment line.
 * @param line Raw line captured from a JSDoc comment block.
 * @returns A cleaned line ready for parsing.
 */
snapshot.signature: export const cleanJSDocLine = (line: string): string => line.replace(/^\s*\* ?/, '').trimEnd();

params.name: param
params.value: line Raw line captured from a JSDoc comment block.

snapshot.returns: A cleaned line ready for parsing.

snapshot.title: Entry Identifier Builder
snapshot.summary: Generates a deterministic identifier from relative file path and line number.
snapshot.description: Generates a deterministic identifier from relative file path and line number.
snapshot.jsdocRaw:
/**
 * @auto-doc
 * @title Entry Identifier Builder
 * @group Parser Helpers
 * Generates a deterministic identifier from relative file path and line number.
 * @param filePath Workspace-relative path for the source file.
 * @param line 1-based source line where the JSDoc block starts.
 * @returns A stable entry id in `path:line` format.
 */
snapshot.signature: export const createId = (filePath: string, line: number): string => `${filePath}:${line}`;

params.name: param
params.value: filePath Workspace-relative path for the source file.

params.name: param
params.value: line 1-based source line where the JSDoc block starts.

snapshot.returns: A stable entry id in `path:line` format.

snapshot.title: Auto-Doc Block Parser
snapshot.summary: Parses a JSDoc block into a structured docs entry when it starts with `@auto-doc`.
snapshot.description:
Parses a JSDoc block into a structured docs entry when it starts with `@auto-doc`.
Supports tags for `@param`, `@returns`, `@response`, `@example`, `@group`, `@title`, and `@description`.
snapshot.jsdocRaw:
/**
 * @auto-doc
 * @title Auto-Doc Block Parser
 * @group Parser Core
 * Parses a JSDoc block into a structured docs entry when it starts with `@auto-doc`.
 * Supports tags for `@param`, `@returns`, `@response`, `@example`, `@group`, `@title`, and `@description`.
 * @param block Raw content captured inside a matched JSDoc block.
 * @param fileContent Full source file text.
 * @param blockStart Start index of the matched block.
 * @param blockEnd End index of the matched block.
 * @param filePath Workspace-relative source file path.
 * @returns A parsed docs entry or null if the block is not eligible.
 */

params.name: param
params.value: block Raw content captured inside a matched JSDoc block.

params.name: param
params.value: fileContent Full source file text.

params.name: param
params.value: blockStart Start index of the matched block.

params.name: param
params.value: blockEnd End index of the matched block.

params.name: param
params.value: filePath Workspace-relative source file path.

snapshot.returns: A parsed docs entry or null if the block is not eligible.
